WP_Context.description: Holds named values you can plug into a prompt template. Wire into a WP Prompt Assembler to use them. Stack multiple Contexts to layer values from different sources.

upstream.name: upstream
upstream.tooltip: Optional: another WP Context to inherit values from. Values you set here override matching ones from upstream.

seed.name: seed
seed.tooltip: Reserved for upcoming randomized module types. Has no effect on the current fixed-values modules.

modules.name: modules
modules.tooltip: Your stack of value modules. Right-click a card → Edit to add or change values.

0.name: context
0.tooltip: Wire into a WP Prompt Assembler, or chain into another WP Context.

WP_PromptAssembler.description: Write your prompt as a template with $variable tokens. The Assembler fills them in from the connected Context, then outputs the final prompt string.

context.name: context
context.tooltip: The WP Context that provides values for your $variables.

template.name: template
template.tooltip: Your prompt template. Use $name to reference variables. Click chips below to insert at the cursor.

0.name: prompt
0.tooltip: Final prompt string with all $variables filled in. Connect to a CLIP Text Encode (or any text input).

WP_Debug.description: Read-only window into a WP Context. Shows every variable + value flowing through this point of the chain. Useful for confirming what your Prompt Assembler will see.

context.name: context
context.tooltip: The WP Context (or Assembler input) to inspect.

viewer.name: viewer
viewer.tooltip: Read-only display. Nothing to edit here.
